---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download PDF](assets/delouis-cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

::: {.cv-preview}
<object data="assets/delouis-cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000">
<p>Your browser can't display the PDF preview. <a href="assets/delouis-cv.pdf">Download the CV instead</a>.</p>
</object>
:::
